text.title: Client Firing Protocol Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Client Firing Protocol output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: notice_letter sent verbally only OR written but <30-day notice

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: client_id populated with a typed value
criteria_met populated with a typed value
notice_letter populated with a typed value
notice_period_days populated with a typed value
handover_package populated with a typed value
final_invoice_status populated with a typed value
post_mortem_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
